entries.label: New binary
entries.code: cargo new my_project
entries.note: Creates a new directory with src/main.rs and Cargo.toml

entries.label: New library
entries.code: cargo new my_lib --lib
entries.note: Creates a library project with src/lib.rs

entries.label: Init in existing dir
entries.code:
cargo init
cargo init --lib
entries.note: Initialize a Cargo project in the current directory

entries.label: Project structure
entries.code:
my_project/
  Cargo.toml
  src/
    main.rs     # binary entry point
    lib.rs      # library entry point
    bin/        # additional binaries
  tests/        # integration tests
  benches/      # benchmarks
  examples/     # example programs
entries.note: Standard Rust project layout conventions

entries.label: Build
entries.code:
cargo build          # debug build
cargo build --release # optimized release build
entries.note: Debug builds are faster to compile; release builds run faster

entries.label: Run
entries.code:
cargo run
cargo run --release
cargo run -- arg1 arg2  # pass args to binary
cargo run --bin other   # run specific binary
entries.note: Builds and runs in one step; -- separates cargo args from program args

entries.label: Check
entries.code: cargo check
entries.note: Type-check without producing a binary; much faster than build

entries.label: Clean
entries.code: cargo clean
entries.note: Remove the target/ directory and all build artifacts

entries.label: Build specific target
entries.code:
cargo build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
cargo build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
entries.note: Cross-compile for a different target architecture

entries.label: Run all tests
entries.code: cargo test
entries.note: Runs unit tests, integration tests, and doc tests

entries.label: Filter tests
entries.code:
cargo test test_name
cargo test module_name::
cargo test -- --exact test_full_name
entries.note: Run tests matching a pattern; --exact for full name match

entries.label: Test options
entries.code:
cargo test -- --nocapture    # show println output
cargo test -- --test-threads=1  # run sequentially
cargo test -- --ignored      # run only #[ignore] tests
cargo test -- --show-output
entries.note: Options after -- are passed to the test binary

entries.label: Specific test target
entries.code:
cargo test --lib             # only unit tests
cargo test --test integration # specific integration test
cargo test --doc             # only doc tests
cargo test --bins            # tests in all binaries
entries.note: Target specific test categories

entries.label: Test with features
entries.code:
cargo test --features "feature1 feature2"
cargo test --all-features
cargo test --no-default-features
entries.note: Control which features are enabled during testing

entries.label: Add dependency
entries.code:
cargo add serde
cargo add serde --features derive
cargo add tokio@1.35 --features full
entries.note: cargo add modifies Cargo.toml; specify version and features

entries.label: Cargo.toml dependencies
entries.note: Manual editing; specify version, features, and other options

entries.label: Dev dependencies
entries.code:
cargo add --dev proptest

# In Cargo.toml:
[dev-dependencies]
proptest = "1.0"
entries.note: Only compiled for tests and examples, not for the final binary

entries.label: Build dependencies
entries.code:
[build-dependencies]
cc = "1.0"
entries.note: Only available in build.rs build scripts

entries.label: Git dependency
entries.note: Depend on a git repository directly; pin with branch, tag, or rev

entries.label: Path dependency
entries.code:
[dependencies]
my_lib = { path = "../my_lib" }
entries.note: Depend on a local crate; useful in workspaces or development

entries.label: Update dependencies
entries.code:
cargo update            # update all within semver constraints
cargo update -p serde   # update specific crate
entries.note: Updates Cargo.lock; respects version constraints in Cargo.toml

entries.label: Define features
entries.code:
[features]
default = ["json"]
json = ["dep:serde_json"]
async = ["dep:tokio"]
full = ["json", "async"]
entries.note: Features enable optional functionality; default lists always-on features

entries.label: Optional dependencies
entries.note: Optional deps are only compiled when their feature is enabled

entries.label: Conditional compilation
entries.note: #[cfg(feature = "...")] gates code on feature flags

entries.label: Use features
entries.code:
cargo build --features "json async"
cargo build --all-features
cargo build --no-default-features
cargo build --no-default-features --features async
entries.note: Enable specific features from command line

entries.label: Define workspace
entries.code:
# Root Cargo.toml
[workspace]
members = [
    "crates/core",
    "crates/cli",
    "crates/server",
]
entries.note: Workspace shares a single Cargo.lock and target/ directory

entries.label: Workspace dependencies
entries.note: Define shared dependency versions in root; reference with workspace = true

entries.label: Run for specific member
entries.code:
cargo build -p core
cargo test -p cli
cargo run -p server
entries.note: -p flag selects a specific workspace member

entries.label: Run for all members
entries.code:
cargo test --workspace
cargo build --workspace
cargo clippy --workspace
entries.note: --workspace runs the command for all members

entries.label: Format code
entries.code:
cargo fmt
cargo fmt --check  # check without modifying
entries.note: Formats all .rs files using rustfmt; configure with rustfmt.toml

entries.label: Lint with clippy
entries.code:
cargo clippy
cargo clippy -- -W clippy::pedantic
cargo clippy --fix  # auto-fix suggestions
entries.note: Catches common mistakes and suggests improvements

entries.label: Fix compiler suggestions
entries.code:
cargo fix
cargo fix --edition  # fix edition migration issues
entries.note: Automatically apply compiler suggestions

entries.label: Generate docs
entries.code:
cargo doc
cargo doc --open           # open in browser
cargo doc --no-deps        # skip dependency docs
cargo doc --document-private-items
entries.note: Generates HTML documentation from doc comments

entries.label: Publish to crates.io
entries.code:
cargo login
cargo publish --dry-run  # check first
cargo publish
entries.note: Requires a crates.io account and API token

entries.label: Package info
entries.code:
[package]
name = "my-crate"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "A useful crate"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/user/repo"
entries.note: Required metadata for publishing to crates.io

entries.label: Benchmarks
entries.code:
cargo bench
cargo bench -- bench_name
entries.note: Run benchmarks; requires nightly for built-in bench or criterion crate for stable

entries.label: Inspect
entries.code:
cargo tree            # dependency tree
cargo tree --duplicates  # find duplicate deps
cargo metadata        # machine-readable project info
entries.note: Understand your dependency graph

entries.label: Audit
entries.code:
cargo install cargo-audit
cargo audit
entries.note: Check dependencies for known security vulnerabilities

entries.label: Expand macros
entries.code:
cargo install cargo-expand
cargo expand          # show expanded macro output
entries.note: See what macros generate; great for debugging derive macros

entries.label: Watch for changes
entries.code:
cargo install cargo-watch
cargo watch -x check
cargo watch -x 'test -- --nocapture'
entries.note: Re-run commands when source files change
